title: Business Breakfast | Stock Market News | July 3, 2026 | TV5 Money

recommendations.note: Prefer Amber over Dixon; go for Amber
recommendations.detail: On valuation Amber is more reasonably priced than Dixon. A new unit is starting up and last quarter's turnover dip was a one-off. Go for Amber. It is a Rs 10 paid-up share, so a stock split is possible.
Among the caller's five new-age picks, Urban Company and Fractal are avoidable for fresh buying.
Already near its 52-week high. It becomes a slightly better bet only after a dip, roughly a 10-15% correction.

recommendations.note: Buy only on a dip; not cheap
recommendations.detail: Rose on strong volumes over the last two-three days and looks set to perform after a long time, but buy only after a dip. It is close to its 52-week high and not cheap - standalone P/E around 67-68, consolidated around 292.

recommendations.note: Hold, don't panic; watch Q1 results
recommendations.detail: To an existing holder: hold and do not panic over the extreme short-term drop caused by the AI-trade reversal. It is a good company; its head is also the Nasscom chief and it should revive. Watch the Q1 results and board-meeting date. (For fresh entry he separately called it avoidable.)
Old dormant physical-certificate holdings; none fundamentally good, still listed around Rs 20. Best to dematerialise and sell.

recommendations.note: Buy with patience; acquisition impact ahead
recommendations.detail: Take it with patience - it has been an underperformer for many days. The real impact of its recent acquisition will be visible in the coming two quarters. Definitely buy.
After a long consolidation, some revival is visible. It is one of the better companies in the packaging industry, so definitely buy.

recommendations.note: No fresh buying; speculative exporter at 52-week high
recommendations.detail: A speculative counter (once given as an investment idea at Rs 304). More of an exporter benefiting from a weak rupee, now at a 52-week high. No fresh buying advised; if already holding, use a trailing stop and hold.
Last quarter's result was very disappointing. Watch whether this quarter improves at all; buying is not advisable now.
Do not buy without seeing the results. Smart-meter names corrected recently on large block deals; wait to see this quarter.
Same as the other smart-meter/electrical names - do not buy without seeing the results; buying is not advisable now.
One of his own long-held stocks. Start buying and accumulate on dips as it moves with market cycles.
One of his own long-held stocks. Buy and accumulate on dips along with market cycles.
Cooling off and falling a bit. Wait and buy when it comes back to attractive levels; do not chase here.
Recently listed and at highs with no track record. Extraordinary margins (operating ~48%, net ~32%), but a Rs 1 paid-up share at Rs 880. Needs more study before giving a verdict.

recommendations.note: Start accumulating; no major dip expected
recommendations.detail: His own stock. Start accumulating - no major dip expected from here as it is already in consolidation mode.
